title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at MSC India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at MSC India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Distribution Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
